case_title: JAMES C SIMPSON, RPT INC VS. MATHEOS YOHANNES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMES C SIMPSON, RPT INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOHANNES, MATHEOS $2,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2017 - CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SUBMITTED ON THE DAY OF THE HEARING UNFILED. THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF JAMES C. SIMPSON, RTP, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATHEOS YOHANNES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,375.00 FILED BY JAMES C SIMPSON, RPT INC AS TO DEFENDANT YOHANNES, MATHEOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-09-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOHANNES, MATHEOS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
